prompt_text:
### Demographics: 79-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 18 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF (No); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~3.8 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Pioglitazone 15mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 63.5 kg; Height 176.8 cm; BMI 20.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 139/76 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.0%; 9 months ago 8.2%; 6 months ago 8.5%; 3 months ago 8.6%; current 8.8%), FPG (12 months ago 201mg/dL; 9 months ago 170mg/dL; 6 months ago 186mg/dL; 3 months ago 180mg/dL; current 208mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 66.9kg; 9 months ago 61.7kg; 6 months ago 63.8kg; 3 months ago 60.2kg; current 63.5kg), Height (12 months ago 176.8cm; 9 months ago 176.8cm; 6 months ago 176.8cm; 3 months ago 176.8cm; current 176.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 20.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 140mmHg; 9 months ago 142mmHg; 6 months ago 145mmHg; 3 months ago 142mmHg; current 139mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 75mmHg; 9 months ago 77mmHg; 6 months ago 75mmHg; 3 months ago 77mmHg; current 76mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 86U/L; 9 months ago 88U/L; 6 months ago 86U/L; 3 months ago 80U/L; current 84U/L), AST (12 months ago 98U/L; 9 months ago 90U/L; 6 months ago 96U/L; 3 months ago 99U/L; current 94U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 94mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 93mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 97mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 92mL/min/1.73m²; current 94mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 107mg/g; 9 months ago 101mg/g; 6 months ago 105mg/g; 3 months ago 101mg/g; current 99mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 72mg/dL; 9 months ago 78mg/dL; 6 months ago 76mg/dL; 3 months ago 79mg/dL; current 75mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 35mg/dL; 9 months ago 35mg/dL; 6 months ago 38mg/dL; 3 months ago 36mg/dL; current 37mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 131mg/dL; 9 months ago 132mg/dL; 6 months ago 144mg/dL; 3 months ago 127mg/dL; current 138mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 15.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.2g/dL; 6 months ago 14.9g/dL; 3 months ago 14.2g/dL; current 14.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.91 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
